headline: SPRM seized RM320 million in assets but returned RM180 million
context: MACC's asset forfeiture unit seized RM320 million in 2024-2025 but courts ordered RM180 million returned due to procedural errors in filing applications.

cards.big: MACC seized RM320 million then lost RM180 million back through court errors
cards.sub: 56% of seized assets returned due to procedural failures, not innocence

cards.big: Anti-Money Laundering Act Section 56 requires strict filing timelines
cards.sub: MACC missed statutory deadlines in 14 out of 23 major forfeiture cases

cards.big: RM180 million returned represents potential schools, clinics, and infrastructure lost
cards.sub: Procedural incompetence cost the public purse nearly half of recovered corruption proceeds

cards.big: Asset forfeiture unit has only 28 officers handling nationwide caseload
cards.sub: Understaffing directly contributed to missed deadlines and incomplete filings

cards.big: Catching corrupt officials means nothing if the system cannot hold onto what it seizes
Should MACC's asset recovery unit be expanded and given dedicated legal counsel?
